summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Dive Down Guide new features: fish icons from wiki, updated zone names, and expanded FAQ. All 9 test requirements passed successfully. Fish icons display correctly in zone tables and search results, zone names updated to 'Megalodon's Lair' and 'The Arctic', FAQ expanded to 9 questions, and mobile responsiveness maintained.
passed_tests: Fish icons appear next to every fish name in zone card tables (verified Goldfish icon in Sunlight Zone, Clownfish icon in Coral Reef)
Fish icons appear in search results (verified 6 shark results with proper icons at /fish-icons/{name}.png)
Updated zone names in sidebar: 'Megalodon's Lair' and 'The Arctic' display correctly
Zone cards show correct updated names: 'Megalodon's Lair' with 5 fish listed, 'The Arctic' with 7 fish listed
Search functionality works: search 'orca' shows result from 'The Arctic' zone
Click search result scrolls to correct zone/fish row and clears search input
FAQ section shows 9 questions that expand/collapse correctly with smooth animations
Rebirth page loads successfully and shows all 10 rebirth cards
Mobile view displays fish icons properly in tables and search results with responsive design
